export.title: Export Metadata
export.qualityCheckDesc: Scan all metadata before export to find forbidden words
export.clickToScan: Click "Scan Now" button to start scanning
export.noIssuesFound: No issues found! All metadata is clean.
export.utf8Encoding: CSV file must be UTF-8 encoded
export.filenameMatch: Metadata won't apply if filename doesn't match

readme.heading: {{platform}} Metadata Export
readme.note1: All CSV files are UTF-8 encoded with BOM (open in Excel as "CSV UTF-8").
readme.note2: If you edit in Excel/Google Sheets, save as "CSV UTF-8" to keep encoding.
readme.note3: Each CSV holds at most 5,000 rows (platform-safe limit).
readme.note4: Upload your media files BEFORE the CSV.
readme.note5: Filenames in CSV must match your uploaded file names exactly.
readme.instructionsAdobe:
1. Log in to Adobe Stock Contributor portal: https://contributor.stock.adobe.com
2. Upload your IMAGE files FIRST (drag & drop or via FTP).
3. Wait until images finish processing.
4. Go to "Upload" → click "Upload spreadsheet" and select each CSV file.
5. Filenames in CSV must match uploaded image filenames EXACTLY.
6. Max 5,000 rows per CSV (this export already complies).
readme.instructionsShutterstock:
1. Log in to Shutterstock Contributor: https://submit.shutterstock.com
2. Upload your IMAGE files first via the Upload page.
3. Once uploaded, go to "Edit" → use "Bulk edit via CSV".
4. Upload each CSV file from this ZIP one by one.
5. Filenames must match exactly.
readme.instructionsFreepik:
1. Log in to Freepik Contributor: https://contributor.freepik.com
2. Upload your image/vector files first.
3. Use the bulk metadata import option.
4. Upload each CSV from this ZIP.
5. Make sure filenames match exactly.
readme.instructionsGeneric:
1. Log in to your {{platform}} contributor account.
2. Upload your media files first.
3. Use the bulk metadata / CSV import option.
4. Upload each CSV file from this ZIP.
5. Filenames in CSV must match uploaded files exactly.
